title: [CI:DOCS] Fix typos --uidmapping and --gidmapping and adjust Markdown layout for --userns
body:
I guess `--uidmapping` and `--gidmapping` are typos and
should be `--uidmap` and `--gidmap`. (I'm not 100% sure so please check this).

In the PR I also rearranged the layout of the `--userns` documenation to make it easier to read.

Let the user provided input that is variable (e.g. _id_) be shown in italics.


<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
Thanks @eriksjolund 
--uidmap and --gidmap are correct, this was a typo.
Couple of small nits.
Please make the same change to the podman create man page.

@Luap99  Adjusted according to your suggestions.

One thing I noticed was that podman-create.1.md had an additional `(default)` in this line

```
`private`: create a new namespace for the container (default)
```

The word `default` was removed to make the sections about `--userns` identical in podman-run.1.md and podman-create.1.md

(I hope that was a correct decision)

I corrected another small error: 
gidmapping now talks about
HOST_GID:CONTAINER_GID
instead of
HOST_UID:CONTAINER_UID
